name: Patient 1
history: History of substance abuse and completed rehabilitation. Ongoing family difficulties involving emotional neglect from mother. Longstanding obesity since childhood with past bullying.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I attend the wedding, people will judge me for my weight and past, so it's better to avoid it.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am fundamentally flawed and will always be excluded from family events.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of social situations, ignoring communication attempts.
situation: Received an invitation to a cousin's upcoming wedding. Has not responded to RSVP or follow-up calls.
auto_thought: They don't really want me there. I'll just be an embarrassment.
behavior: Avoid responding to wedding invitation and family contact.
